languages.text: "Она напоминает о том, что наше выживание построено на костях предыдущих Призывов, а на наших костях вырастут наши дети. Она о нашем долге и об искуплении".
"It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones will our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."
languages.original_text: "Она напоминает о том, что наше выживание построено на костях предыдущих Призывов, а на наших костях вырастут наши дети. Она о нашем долге и об искуплении".

traits.locale_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Callings that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."
"It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Callings that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."
"It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

"It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones will our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

languages.text: “它告诫我们，我们的生命，是由一代代征召者的枯骨垒成的，而将来我们的尸骨也会成为后人存活的根基。它诉说着我们的职责和救赎。”
languages.original_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

traits.locale_text: “它告诫我们，我们的生命，是由一代代征召者的枯骨垒成的，而将来我们的尸骨也会成为后人存活的根基。它诉说着我们的职责和救赎。”

languages.text: "Bize hayatta kalmamızın, bizden önce gelen Sevk Gruplarının kemikleri üzerine inşa edildiğini ve çocuklarımızın da bizim kemiklerimiz üzerinde büyüyeceğini hatırlatır. Görevimizden ve kefaretten bahseder."
languages.original_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

traits.locale_text: "Bize hayatta kalmamızın, bizden önce gelen Sevk Gruplarının kemikleri üzerine inşa edildiğini ve çocuklarımızın da bizim kemiklerimiz üzerinde büyüyeceğini hatırlatır. Görevimizden ve kefaretten bahseder."

languages.text: « Il nous rappelle que nous avons bâti notre survie sur les os de nos prédécesseurs et que les nôtres, à leur tour, soutiendront les progrès de nos enfants. Il parle de notre devoir et de notre expiation. »
languages.original_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

traits.locale_text: « Il nous rappelle que nous avons bâti notre survie sur les os de nos prédécesseurs et que les nôtres, à leur tour, soutiendront les progrès de nos enfants. Il parle de notre devoir et de notre expiation. »

languages.text: «Nos recuerda que nuestra supervivencia se basa en los restos de los llamados anteriores, y que nuestros hijos crecerán sobre nuestros huesos. Habla del deber y de la expiación».
languages.original_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

traits.locale_text: «Nos recuerda que nuestra supervivencia se basa en los restos de los llamados anteriores, y que nuestros hijos crecerán sobre nuestros huesos. Habla del deber y de la expiación».

languages.text: "Sie erinnert uns daran, dass unser Überleben auf den Knochen der Einberufungen basiert, die vor uns kamen, und dass auf unseren eigenen Knochen unsere Kinder aufwachsen werden. Sie spricht von Pflicht und Sühne."
languages.original_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

traits.locale_text: "Sie erinnert uns daran, dass unser Überleben auf den Knochen der Einberufungen basiert, die vor uns kamen, und dass auf unseren eigenen Knochen unsere Kinder aufwachsen werden. Sie spricht von Pflicht und Sühne."

languages.text: 「我々の生き残りは、我々を呼んだ先人の骨の上に成り立っている。そして我々の骨の上に、我々の子供たちは育つ。それは我々の義務と贖罪を語る。」
languages.original_text: "It reminds us that our survival is built upon the bones of the Call-Ups that came before, and that upon our own bones shall our children grow. It speaks of our duty and of atonement."

traits.locale_text: 「我々の生き残りは、我々を呼んだ先人の骨の上に成り立っている。そして我々の骨の上に、我々の子供たちは育つ。それは我々の義務と贖罪を語る。」
